title: Savory Silky Comforting Venezuelan Queso Stir-fry
description: A creamy and comforting dish featuring a blend of dairy-free elements with the warmth of vanilla pod to enhance its velvety texture.

ingredients.name: Silken tofu
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is drained and pressed to remove excess liquid.

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet with olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the split vanilla bean and chili flakes to the hot oil, cooking for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add silken tofu and almond milk. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes until the mixture thickens slightly.
Fold in fresh herbs, soy sauce or tamari, and continue stirring until everything is heated through and well combined.
Serve hot with additional herbs on top if desired.
